title: Meat, Poultry, and Fish Cutters and Trimmers
description: Use hands or hand tools to perform routine cutting and trimming of meat, poultry, and seafood.

tasks.text: Use knives, cleavers, meat saws, bandsaws, or other equipment to perform meat cutting and trimming.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Weigh meats and tag containers for weight and contents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect meat products for defects, bruises or blemishes and remove them along with any excess fat.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Cut and trim meat to prepare for packing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Separate meats and byproducts into specified containers and seal containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Process primal parts into cuts that are ready for retail use.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare ready-to-heat foods by filleting meat or fish or cutting it into bite-sized pieces, preparing and adding vegetables or applying sauces or breading.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, trim, slice, and section carcasses for future processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove parts, such as skin, feathers, scales or bones, from carcass.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain and distribute specified meat or carcass.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Produce hamburger meat and meat trimmings.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
